reason: Trellis pre-development entry point and checklist for this single-repo project.
Confirms API/frontend assets remain entry-point layer changes and backend contracts are not inverted.
Quality and testing expectations for small scoped changes.
Shared guide index for cross-layer and reuse thinking.
This UI derives behavior from API feedback row fields and must preserve the boundary contract.
Use existing save/promotion helpers instead of adding duplicate backend or frontend flows.
